Sanskrit: जलस्य मात्रा पादप्रजाते: उपरि निर्भरा वर्तते ।
English: With regard to the amount of water to use one needs to consider the species of the flowers and their water requirements.

Sanskrit: "अनन्तरं सिदूकिनाम् निरुत्तरत्ववार्तां निशम्य फिरूशिन एकत्र मिलितवन्तः,"
English: "But when the Pharisees had heard that he had put the Sadducees to silence, they were gathered together."

Sanskrit: श्वास लेने और छोडने के समय पर ध्यान दें ।
English: Observe the time of your inhalation and exhalation.

Sanskrit: फ़ैल् लोकेशन् इतीदं Desktop इति चिन्वन्तु । Save button नुदन्तु ।
English: Choose the file location as Desktop. Click on Save button.

Sanskrit: अत्र थ्री इस् ईक्वल् टु थ्री इति दर्शयति ।
English: Here we see it is showing 3 is equal to 3.

Sanskrit: "तादृशान् लोकान् अस्मतप्रभो र्यीशुख्रीष्टस्य नाम्ना वयम् इदम् आदिशाम आज्ञापयामश्च, ते शान्तभावेन कार्य्यं कुर्व्वन्तः स्वकीयमन्नं भुञ्जतां।"
English: "Now them that are such we command and exhort by our Lord Jesus Christ, that with quietness they work, and eat their own bread."

Sanskrit: "हे भ्रातरोऽहमिदं ब्रवीमि, इतः परं समयोऽतीव संक्षिप्तः,"
English: "But this I say, brethren, the time is short: it remaineth, that both they that have wives be as though they had none;"
